apps:property.name: doesNotHaveTheWord
apps:property.value: Test_page OR "test alarm" OR testalarm OR LLEngDailyTestAlm OR "EmergencyPowerStatus" OR GENERATOR OR "Generator_REF1T_BB" OR "GenStsOn_Al" OR GenComAlm_Al OR "35_PH_GeneratorStatus" OR "Base_Generator_Status"

apps:property.name: label
apps:property.value: UPark Siemens Alarms from Power Automate

apps:property.name: hasTheWord
apps:property.value: Test_page OR "test alarm" OR testalarm OR LLEngDailyTestAlm
